name: Exclaimer
tagline: Centrally managed email signatures for Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace.
summary: Exclaimer applies consistent, brand-managed email signatures across Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace, server-side via a mail-flow connector or client-side via the Outlook Add-in. MSPs use it to standardise signatures, disclaimers, and campaign banners across many tenants without touching individual mailboxes.
